changes.description: Reverted to pre-SQO state (ae3d657). Removed SQOOverlayStateResolver import, sqoOverlays from emptyPropsShape, overlay resolution block, and sqoOverlays from all return paths.
Reverted to pre-SQO state (ae3d657). Removed 6 SQO component functions, sqoOverlays from signature, 6 component invocations from render tree, and SQO CSS block.
Replaced direct-rendering tests with boundary enforcement tests. 23 tests assert LENS does NOT consume SQO directly. Validates PATH B and Q-class preservation.
Reclassified as EXPERIMENTAL_PROTOTYPE. Added non-canonical classification header.
Formal boundary classification. 8-point doctrine: LENS is not the SQO cockpit, LENS consumes projection objects, PATH B owns projection authority.
Defines canonical and forbidden consumption flows. SQO artifacts must pass through PATH B qualification envelope builder before LENS rendering.
Detailed revert report: what was removed, what was preserved, verification results.
Future direction: SQO visibility belongs in a dedicated SQO Cockpit, not LENS. Retained prototype assets listed.
Full validation results. 23 boundary enforcement tests, 8 targeted regression suites, 647/647 full regression.
